boys_hostel.rooms: Single, double, and triple sharing rooms available

girls_hostel.rooms: Single and double sharing rooms available
girls_hostel.note: Girls hostel has separate entry gate with 24x7 female security staff

mess.note: Monthly menu is displayed on the hostel notice board. Special meals on festivals.

curfew.note: Late entry requires prior permission from warden

rules.visitors: Visitors allowed 10 AM to 6 PM in common area only. No visitors in rooms.
rules.leave: Leave application required for overnight absence. Parents must be informed.
rules.ragging: Ragging is strictly prohibited. Anti-ragging committee is active.
rules.alcohol_drugs: Strictly prohibited. Immediate expulsion on violation.

safety.cctv: CCTV cameras installed at all entry/exit points and corridors
safety.fire_safety: Fire extinguishers and smoke detectors installed on every floor
safety.medical: Medical room with first aid. Tie-up with nearby hospital for emergencies.

location: Hostel Campus, Gate 2, adjacent to main college building
admission_process: Hostel allotment is done on first-come-first-served basis after college admission confirmation. Apply at hostel office.
